content:
Remote leadership across time zones and languages demands a specific kind of clarity. Vague English in async communication compounds across every handoff. This seminar teaches you to keep distributed teams aligned, motivated, and moving.

## What you'll learn
- Running crisp, inclusive virtual meetings that respect everyone's time and timezone
- Giving performance feedback that lands across cultures — direct enough to act on, respectful enough to preserve trust
- Writing weekly updates and project summaries that people actually open and read
- Building rapport and psychological safety without a shared office or shared first language

## Who it's for
Team leads and managers coordinating international or hybrid teams across multiple time zones.
title: Leading Global Virtual Teams
